content:
# Harbor Growth Business Checking Terms

## Account Fit
Harbor Growth Business Checking is a Northstar Bank business deposit account for customers who need a business_checking account with a higher activity band than an entry business account. The account is interest bearing: True. It is not earnings allowance eligible: False. Use "Business Checking Product Comparison" when comparing this account against other business checking options.

## Opening Requirements
Opening a Harbor Growth Business Checking account requires a minimum opening deposit of 25. Do not quote a lower opening deposit for promotional or relationship customers unless another approved article supplies that rule. If the customer is deciding between this account and Harbor Starter Business Checking, confirm expected monthly activity and balance pattern before recommending the product.

## Monthly Fee and Waivers
The monthly fee is 25. The fee can be waived by meeting either the minimum daily balance waiver of 10000 or the combined deposit balance waiver of 15000. A premium personal relationship waiver is available: True. See "Business Checking Fee Waiver Policy" for waiver application guidance.

## Activity and Linked Accounts
The monthly transaction band maximum is 500. The account includes 1 linked account, and the additional linked account fee is 0.
title: Harbor Growth Business Checking Terms
